headline: Opkey Release Advisor: Speed Up Oracle and Workday Release Analysis By 80% with Agentic AI
summary: Agentic AI helps teams analyze hundreds of cloud release features instantly, simplifying how customers understand release impact and defining action plans to keep up with the pace of changePITTSBURGH, March 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Opkey, provider of the leading Cloud Application Lifecycle Management (CALM) platform for Oracle, Workday, Coupa, UKG, and more, today announced Opkey Release Advisor, an agentic AI-powered solution that quickly turns enterprise SaaS release updates into tailored
